craft.description: Full confirmed-brief-then-build flow para Flutter (ou web). Runs multi-round shape discovery first, resolves visual probe and north-star mock gates when available, then builds with Material 3, Cupertino, ThemeData, ColorScheme, TextTheme. Use when building a new Flutter feature end-to-end (widget, screen, flow).

teach.description: Gathers design context for a project. Multi-round discovery interview when context is missing; writes PRODUCT.md (strategic: users, brand, principles, platform_strategy material/cupertino/adaptive) and DESIGN.md (visual: ColorScheme, TextTheme, components). Every other command reads these files. Use once per project.

document.description: Generate DESIGN.md from existing Flutter codebase. Auto-extracts ThemeData, ColorScheme.fromSeed seed, TextTheme M3 papéis, ThemeExtension tokens, EdgeInsets recorrentes, components em lib/widgets, motion durations. Detects Material vs Cupertino strategy. Outputs Google Stitch DESIGN.md format. Use when você precisa de um spec visual que outro agente possa seguir.

extract.description: Pull reusable Flutter widgets and design tokens em design system. Identifies repeated patterns (TextStyle hard-coded, EdgeInsets monotônicos, BoxDecoration, ListTile customizados) and consolidates em ThemeExtension/theme files/lib/widgets. Use when há drift no codebase Flutter.

live.description: Modo iterativo de variantes para Flutter. MVP v0.1: agente gera 3 variantes do widget alvo no source (lib/), usuário aplica via hot reload (`r` em flutter run) e escolhe. v0.2 planned: VM Service overlay com long-press para selecionar widget. Use para iterar UI rapidamente.

adapt.description: Adaptar design Flutter para diferentes window classes (compact <600 / medium / expanded / large / extra-large), foldables, orientações, ou plataforma (Material vs Cupertino vs adaptive). Switch entre BottomNavigationBar / NavigationRail / NavigationDrawer. Use quando user menciona adaptive, responsive, tablet, foldable, plataforma-correctness, SafeArea, MediaQuery.

animate.description: Add purposeful Flutter animations: implicit (AnimatedContainer, AnimatedOpacity, AnimatedSwitcher, Hero) ou explicit (AnimationController + Tween + CurvedAnimation). Honors MediaQuery.disableAnimationsOf. Use quando user menciona animation, transitions, micro-interactions, motion, Hero, Material Motion.

audit.description: Roda quality checks técnicos em código Flutter: a11y (Semantics, tooltip, contraste WCAG sobre cores resolvidas), performance (RepaintBoundary, const, rebuild count, frame budget 16ms), theming (ThemeData/ColorScheme/TextTheme, sem literals), adaptive (window classes, SafeArea, textScaler), anti-patterns (Curves.bounce, Colors.deepPurple seed, side-stripe). Score 0-4 por dimensão + P0-P3 issues. Use quando user pede a11y check, perf audit, technical review.

bolder.description: Amplificar designs Flutter tímidos/genéricos. Tipografia (FontWeight.w900 vs w200, FontVariation, display fonts, escala dramática), cor (seedColor saturado, ColorScheme drenched, surfaceTint), spatial (assimétrico via Stack/Positioned, generous spacing), motion (Hero, SliverAppBar colapsável). Use quando design parece bland, genérico, sem personalidade.

clarify.description: Melhorar UX copy em Flutter: InputDecoration labels/hint/helper/errorText, SnackBar action verbs, AlertDialog actions específicos (verbo + objeto não OK/Cancel), tooltip em IconButton, semanticLabel em Image. Brevidade mobile (SnackBar 80 chars, push notification 30/120 chars). Use quando user menciona texto confuso, labels ruins, error messages, UX writing mobile.

colorize.description: Adicionar cor estratégica a UI Flutter monocromática. ColorScheme.fromSeed M3, surfaceTint, primaryContainer/tertiaryContainer, semantic colors via ThemeExtension (success/warning/info), gradients intencionais (não purple-blue genérico). Bane Colors.deepPurple, gradient AppBar. Use quando design parece cinza, sem warmth, precisa palette mais expressiva.

critique.description: Avaliar design Flutter de uma perspectiva UX: hierarquia visual via TextTheme/colorScheme, IA, carga cognitiva, ressonância emocional, AI slop detection (Material baseline default, gradient AppBar, splash genérico, deepPurple seed). Score Nielsen 0-4, persona testing (Casey mobile, Diego low-end, Sam a11y), feedback acionável. Use quando user pede review/critique/feedback de design.

delight.description: Adicionar moments de joy em Flutter: AnimatedScale press feedback, HapticFeedback.lightImpact, confetti package em milestones, Lottie/Rive em hero moments, custom ripple, Hero entre rotas, easter eggs. Use quando user pede polish/personality, micro-interactions, fazer interface feel fun ou memorável.

distill.description: Strip Flutter UI para essência. Remove Card aninhado, EdgeInsets arbitrários fora de tokens, TextStyle literals, decorações sem função. Reduz `Container > Padding > Container > Padding` aninhamento. Consolida em ThemeExtension. Use quando user pede simplify, declutter, reduce noise, cleaner UI.

harden.description: Tornar UI Flutter production-ready: text overflow (Flexible/Wrap/maxLines+ellipsis), MediaQuery.textScaler em 130%/200%, RTL via EdgeInsetsDirectional, intl + .arb plurals, error states com retry, optimistic UI com rollback, dispose() em controllers, mounted check, connectivity_plus para offline. Use quando user pede harden, production-ready, edge cases, i18n, RTL.

onboard.description: Design first-run flows em Flutter: welcome screens via PageView + SmoothPageIndicator, Stepper, showcaseview/tutorial_coach_mark para spotlight, empty states com FilledButton.icon, RestorationMixin para state preservation. SharedPreferences para track 'onboarding_v1_complete'. Use quando user menciona onboarding, first-time, empty states, activation, aha moment.

layout.description: Melhorar layout/spacing/ritmo em Flutter. EdgeInsets via ThemeExtension<SpacingTokens> (4/8/16/24/32), SizedBox tokens, Row/Column com spacing: (3.27+), Wrap/GridView.builder com SliverGridDelegateWithMaxCrossAxisExtent, LayoutBuilder para container queries. Bane EdgeInsets.all(N) monotônico, Card aninhado, everything-centered. Use quando layout parece off, spacing inconsistente, hierarquia fraca.

optimize.description: Diagnose+fix performance Flutter: const widgets, RepaintBoundary, AnimatedBuilder com child:, evitar AnimatedContainer mudando width/height (relayout), cached_network_image + cacheWidth, ListView.builder com itemExtent, ValueListenableBuilder vs setState global, isolates para work pesado. DevTools Performance, flutter run --profile, --analyze-size. Use quando user menciona slow, laggy, janky, app size, frame drops.

overdrive.description: Push Flutter UI além do convencional: flutter_shaders + .frag GLSL, CustomPainter avançado, Impeller-aware effects, SpringSimulation physics, Hero shared element, SliverAppBar parallax, FFI para near-native, isolates para compute. Honra disableAnimationsOf, fallback estático. Use quando user quer wow, impress, all-out, extraordinary.

polish.description: Final quality pass em Flutter pré-shipping. Alignment via ThemeExtension<SpacingTokens>, sem TextStyle/Color literal, WidgetState completo, Curves M3, MediaQuery.textScaler/disableAnimationsOf honored, touch target 48dp, contraste WCAG validado em ambos brightness, dart analyze zero, flutter test passa, 60fps em low-end. Use quando user menciona polish, finishing touches, pré-launch.

quieter.description: Reduzir intensidade visual em Flutter. Reduzir saturação seedColor, dessaturar tertiary ou remover, dominância de surfaceContainer*, hairline borders/dividers (thickness 0.5), reduzir FontWeight (w900→w600), motion mais sutil (distâncias menores, easeOutCubic). Use quando design parece loud, aggressive, garish, overstimulating.

shape.description: Plan UX/UI antes do código Flutter. Multi-round discovery interview com perguntas sobre platform strategy (material/cupertino/adaptive), window classes alvo, MediaQuery.textScaler behavior, perf budget low-end Android, A11y. Produz design brief confirmado pelo user. Use antes de craft, ou para planning standalone.

typeset.description: Melhorar tipografia em Flutter: TextTheme M3 (15 papéis displayLarge→labelSmall), GoogleFonts ou bundle .ttf, FontVariation para variable fonts, TextStyle.height para line-height, FontFeature.tabularFigures para listas, MediaQuery.textScaler honored, 50-75 chars por linha em mobile. Use quando user menciona fonts, type, readability, hierarchy, ALL-CAPS letterSpacing.
